misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: magazine cover/title page, table of contents for February 1918 issue, advertisers' directory listing local Salt Lake City businesses, some General Board reports about Relief Society activities in various stakes (Sevier, Tooele, Beaver), and back matter advertisements for music, agricultural college, garments, etc. The General Board content appears to be brief reports/updates rather than standalone articles, and falls below the 200 character threshold for extraction.
